faq_a1: Go to Transactions > Import and select your OFX, CSV or XLSX file. The system auto-detects categories.
faq_a2: Premium unlocks: statement imports, PJ space, unlimited jars, automatic DDA and real-time quotes.
faq_a3: Yes! Your data is encrypted and stored on Supabase with per-user access policies. No one else can access your information.
faq_a4: In the side menu, tap the PF/PJ badge to switch. PJ space is a Premium feature for business management.
faq_a5: Yes! Log in with the same credentials on any device. Data syncs automatically via the cloud.
faq_a6: Go to Menu > Currencies and select your base currency. The app supports BRL, USD, EUR, ARS and more.
